comment.body:
In a trade, an exit is just as important as an entry. If everyone in here wants the entries, they should see the exits. Simple.

Funny how if price gapped 50 points the other way everyone would assume Alma is still holding those contracts for fat profits. But they gap against her, and undoubtedly she got out with profit yesterday on the dips. Shouldn’t be left up to speculation.

comment.body: She always says she uses Stop losses. If you guys aren't that's your fault. If things move fast she will be out, she can't post everything so fast. In this example, she probably was adjusting her stop losses with the moves, and took profit on the down and probably adjusted her stops above a loss. If the move had been going up she would have been adjusting her stop loss accordingly. That is how you trade with risk management, she doesn't need to post everything.
comment.raw_body: She always says she uses Stop losses. If you guys aren't that's your fault. If things move fast she will be out, she can't post everything so fast. comment.body: I don't know, it seems to me that people refer to Alma as the oracle of Delphi. She trades on probabilities, the process seems to me to explain it well but I don't understand this search for the signal at all costs. Since probable and possible are different concepts, she could also be wrong, as others suggest she has stops, she doesn't have to write "I closed the trade at a loss". Come on...
